---
title: "{{subject}}"
author: "{{author}}"
date: today
place: "{{place}}"
lang: fr
format:
  lettre-html: default
  lettre-pdf: default
  lettre-typst: default
---

::: from
{{author}}
:::

::: to
{{to_name}}
{{to_addr}}
:::

::: opening
Madame, Monsieur,
:::

::: body
Veuillez trouver ci-joint ...
:::

::: closing
Veuillez agréer mes salutations distinguées,
:::

::: signature
{{author}}
:::
